validations.name: input_inventory_completeness
validations.evidence: All 8 mandatory inputs present and readable. File-level SHA-256 recorded for each.

validations.name: 42_22_inputs_unmodified
validations.evidence: 42.22 inputs verified unmodified. SHA-256 values match those recorded at 42.22 stream close.

validations.name: closed_set_resolved_from_42_22
validations.evidence: attribute_lineage.json carries closed_set = [high, medium, low, none]. Outcome B confirmed. No ambiguity remains.

validations.name: none_governed_confirmed
validations.evidence: NONE confirmed as governed closed-set member (layer_origin 44.3, carrier 44.2, pass_through = true). Not a fallback.

validations.name: render_none_not_fallback
validations.evidence: Normalized 51.1 artifacts explicitly declare RENDER_NONE as governed mapping outcome. No fallback language present.

validations.name: execution_evidence_shell_only
validations.evidence: All 51.1 artifacts replayed using cat <<'EOF' shell commands. Full shell command trail preserved and auditable.

validations.name: full_file_content_verified
validations.evidence: All replayed files verified via sed -n output. No truncation. Full content confirmed post-creation.

validations.name: closure_wording_normalized
validations.evidence: Distribution section labeled as non-canonical evidence in both rendering_spec.md and CLOSURE.md. No semantic rendering conclusion presented.

validations.name: no_new_rendering_semantics
validations.evidence: Normalization resolved language clarity only. No new rendering states introduced. No new emphasis values introduced.

validations.name: 51_1_artifacts_all_present
validations.evidence: All 5 mandatory 51.1 artifacts present post-normalization with updated checksums recorded.

validations.name: no_upstream_artifact_modified
validations.evidence: No 42.x, 43.x, or 44.x artifacts modified. Pre- and post-normalization checksums for 42.22 inputs are identical.

validations.name: no_fail_closed_triggers_fired
validations.evidence: All fail-closed conditions checked: all inputs present, closed set resolved unambiguously, NONE status determined, replay shell-only, no semantic reinterpretation required.

validations.name: downstream_gate_recorded
validations.evidence: 51.2 gate status = OPEN recorded in normalization_report.md. 75.x remains blocked. Gate decision is explicit.
